case_title: MOREL, GERARD R. vs. DANAO, CHRISTINE MARIE BAUTISTA et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO ENTER UD JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION DUE TO DEFENDNT DEFAULT, GRANTED BY JUDGE DESMOND #2, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOREL, GERARD R.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOREL, GERARD R. AS TO DEFENDANT DANAO, CHRISTINE MARIE BAUTISTA DANAO, CRISANTO SUED AS CRISTANO DANAO, EMILY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DANAO, CHRISTINE MARIE BAUTISTA DANAO, CRISANTO SUED AS CRISTANO DANAO, EMILY
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOREL, GERARD R. COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-07-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DECLARATION SUPPORTING REQUEST THAT COURT APPROVE UNLAWFUL DETAINER STIPULATION DESPITE DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO APPROVE AS TO FORM AND CONTENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
ORDER APPROVING UNLAWFUL DETAINER STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF, SIGNED BY COURT, AND COPIES MAILED TO ALL PARTIES WITH CLERK'S CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL.

DEPT 1/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:KAREN BAUER/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY DAVID MENDEZ PRESENT WITH PLTF. ATNY BARRY TAGAWA PRESENT FOR DEFTS. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE SIGNED STIPULATION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANAO, CHRISTINE MARIE BAUTISTA DANAO, CRISANTO SUED AS CRISTANO DANAO, EMILY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 945 DARIEN WAY, SF, CA $6,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER STAYS. (SEE JUDGMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS).
